category_sources: source_facts.description says speech synthesizer supporting more than hundred languages and accents; official README describes eSpeak NG text-to-speech.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is eSpeak NG Text-to-Speech; source_facts.name is espeak-ng.
docs_sources: Official README has a Documentation section linking to user guide, building guide, index, contribution guide, and roadmap in the repo docs directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/espeak-ng/espeak-ng; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe text-to-speech, supported languages, command-line program, and shared library.
